history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A group of young people stand in a bathroom with large mirrors. The person in the foreground, facing the camera, is a young man wearing a black baseball cap with "CONFLICT-X" embroidered in white and red lettering, and a small US flag design across the brim, obscuring his eyes. He has a silver chain with a star pendant and is wearing a white t-shirt with a black graphic of a star containing a silhouette of a person. He is also wearing very baggy, light-wash denim jeans and white Crocs. His left hand is raised, middle finger extended. To his left, another young man is visible from the back, also wearing a black baseball cap and a white t-shirt. Further in the background, reflected in the mirrors, are two young women. The bathroom has light grey tiled walls and a brown paper towel dispenser mounted on the wall. The lighting is a mix of overhead ambient light and some artificial light, creating soft shadows. The overall mood is casual and slightly rebellious.
